creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #5)
And my gitup.conf is a fresh one:

"ports" : {
                "repository_path"  : "/ports.git",
                "branch"           : "main",
                "target_directory" : "/usr/ports",
                "ignores"          : [
                        "distfiles",
                        "packages",
                        "INDEX-11",
                        "INDEX-12",
                        "INDEX-13",
                        "INDEX-14",
               ],
        },
